## What needs to be documented?

- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Other (please specify)

- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] Inline documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Additional context
Add any other context or specific details about the documentation request.
